summary: Blog SEO AI Generation Feature - All tests passed. Backend POST /api/ai/generate-blog-seo endpoint correctly returns JSON with seo_title, seo_description, excerpt, tags, seo_keywords. Frontend admin modal in 'THE DEN' tab has Content and SEO tabs. SEO tab shows 'Generate SEO from Content' button, Google Preview, SEO fields with progress bars, and SEO Checklist. AI generation returns preview with individual Apply buttons and Apply All button. All fields successfully populate when Apply All is clicked.

issues: TipTap editor warning about duplicate extension names ('link', 'underline') - non-blocking but should be cleaned up

tests: POST /api/ai/generate-blog-seo returns correct JSON structure - PASS
SEO response contains all expected fields (seo_title, seo_description, excerpt, tags, seo_keywords) - PASS
Minimal input (title only) generates valid SEO - PASS

3. Blog posts list displayed (1 published post visible)
6. Content tab shows Title, Slug, Status, Cover Image, Excerpt, Content editor, Tags
7. SEO tab shows 'Generate SEO from Content' button (data-testid='ai-generate-seo-btn')
8. SEO tab shows Google Preview section with live title/description preview
9. SEO tab shows SEO Title input with progress bar (character count)
10. SEO tab shows Meta Description textarea with progress bar
11. SEO tab shows Meta Keywords input
12. SEO tab shows SEO Checklist section with 5 checks

14. Clicking 'Apply All' populates all SEO fields and shows toast 'All SEO fields applied'

AI-Generated SEO preview panel with individual Apply buttons
SEO Title input with progress bar
Meta Description textarea with progress bar

Consider adding loading state/skeleton to SEO tab while AI is generating
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used test payloads for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog SEO AI generation feature is fully working. Backend endpoint at POST /api/ai/generate-blog-seo returns 5 fields. Frontend SEO tab in blog modal mirrors The Armory's AI generation system. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing. The AI integration uses emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
